name: 14" Baby Doll Halloween Pumpkin Outfit - Gigglescape™
description:
Keep your child excited for the Halloween season with this 7-Piece Halloween Pumpkin Doll Outfit from Gigglescape™. This doll costume features a yellow bodysuit with a pumpkin accent on the front, bringing fall season vibes. Boasting soft, plush construction, this doll costume comes with a plush ghost, a pumpkin basket, and three-piece plush candies to enhance imaginative play and storytelling activities. Additionally, this costume fits dolls sized up to 14 inches and is ideal for play by children aged three and above.

Gigglescape™: Where play starts and discovery never ends.
